governing_principle: Monetization must reinforce trust, not extract attention. No monetization may damage the strategic value of the asset.

phase_1_foundation.label: Foundation
phase_1_foundation.description: No monetization elements. Trust and authority are built before income is introduced.

phase_2_first_offer.label: First Offer
phase_2_first_offer.description: The first offer must be directly tied to the SXO framework, high-trust in format, and designed to reinforce authority.

phase_3_expanded_offers.label: Expanded Offers
phase_3_expanded_offers.description: Additional offers may be added only after Phase 2 offer demonstrates alignment and authority metrics show positive trajectory.

phase_4_partnerships.label: Partnership and Licensing
phase_4_partnerships.description: Strategic partnerships and agency licensing after documented partner alignment review and owner approval.

free_self_assessment.label: Free SuperSXO Self-Assessment
free_self_assessment.description: Trust-building diagnostic tool available at no cost. Establishes authority and leads naturally to paid offerings.

paid_diagnostic_report.label: Paid Diagnostic Report
paid_diagnostic_report.description: High-value, low-volume professional report. Demonstrates depth of the SXO framework. Reinforces authority.

sxo_audit_report.label: SXO Audit Report
sxo_audit_report.description: Commercial-grade deliverable tied to the SXO methodology. Primary conversion offer on /sxo-audit/.

template_pack.label: Template Pack
template_pack.description: Scalable product built from the SXO methodology. Professional positioning. Reinforces framework authority.

agency_licensing.label: Agency Licensing
agency_licensing.description: Framework licensing for professional service providers. High-value and low-volume. Reinforces acquisition positioning.

selective_tool_partnership.label: Selective Tool Partnership
selective_tool_partnership.description: Tool partnerships available only after authority is established and only with brands that do not damage asset dignity.

strategic_sponsorship_later.label: Strategic Sponsorship
strategic_sponsorship_later.description: Sponsorships only after authority is established and only with strategically aligned brands. Requires explicit owner approval.

random_display_ads.label: Random Display Ads
random_display_ads.reason: Damages asset dignity and category authority. Makes the asset look cheap.

aggressive_popups.label: Aggressive Popups
aggressive_popups.reason: Damages user trust, degrades experience quality, and contradicts the SXO thesis.

thin_affiliate_pages.label: Thin Affiliate Pages
thin_affiliate_pages.reason: Creates low-quality content that degrades SEO authority and contradicts the sovereign content standard.

fake_scarcity.label: Fake Scarcity Tactics
fake_scarcity.reason: Low-trust commercial practice. Contradicts the institutional and dignified positioning of the asset.

low_trust_lead_traps.label: Low-Trust Lead Traps
low_trust_lead_traps.reason: Degrades user trust and damages the search-to-action journey that SuperSXO is designed to govern.

irrelevant_sponsorships.label: Irrelevant Sponsorships
irrelevant_sponsorships.reason: Dilutes category authority and sends conflicting signals to strategic buyers.

cheap_monetization_patterns.label: Cheap Monetization Patterns
cheap_monetization_patterns.reason: Any monetization pattern that causes a strategic buyer to reconsider acquisition is prohibited.
